action.command:
cat << 'EOF' > .agentcode/blueprints/_roles.yaml
roles:
  admin:
    name: Admin
    description: "Admin role"
  user:
    name: User
    description: "User role"
EOF

tool_call.name: terminal
tool_call.arguments:
{"security_risk": "LOW", "summary": "Write _roles.yaml", "command": "cat << 'EOF' > .agentcode/blueprints/_roles.yaml
roles:
  admin:
    name: Admin
    description: "Admin role"
  user:
    name: User
    description: "User role"
EOF"}
